revision.text: [[Category:Pages with blank templates]] <noinclude> [[Category:Blank templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing placeholder pages to clear up the wanted pages
revision.text: [[Category:Pages with blank templates]] <noinclude> [[Category:Blank templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:Pages with blank templates]] <noinclude> [[Category:Blank templates]] </noinclude>" to "<includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Pool]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Pool]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Pool]]" to "[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of {{subst:PAGENAME}}]]"
revision.text: <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of {{subst:PAGENAME}}]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>

<includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of {{subst:PAGENAME}}]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Expensive]][[Category:11]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "<includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of {{subst:PAGENAME}}]]</includeonly>" to "[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of {{subst:PAGENAME}}]]"
revision.text: [[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Expensive]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Expensive]][[Category:11]] </noinclude>
[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Expensive]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Expensive]][[Category:11]] </noinclude> [[Category:unused templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
revision.text:
<noinclude>
</noinclude>
{{draft categories| [[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Expensive]] [[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:unused templates]] }} [[sn:Expensive]]
#redirect[[:en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]" to " <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]</noinclude>
#redirect[[:en:Template:Expensive]] <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

#redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: [[MOS:BLANKALT]], update, detect namespace (if it is not in the module namespace it is used as a template, even if it is not in the template namespace)
revision.text: {{ombox | type = style | image = [[File:Ambox warning yellow.svg|40x40px|link=|alt=]] | text = Due to a server limit of '''500''' "[[Help:Template limits#Expensive parser function calls|expensive parser function]]" calls <small>(e.g. [[mw:Help:Extension:ParserFunctions##ifexist|#ifexist:]], [[mw:Help:Magic words#Technical metadata|PAGESIZE:]], and [[mw:Help:Magic words#Statistics|PAGESINCATEGORY:]])</small>, this {{#ifeq: Module | {{NAMESPACE}} | module | template}} will only work properly if the page using it has not already exceeded the limit. When the limit is exceeded, the page using this template or module is categorised in [[:Category:Pages with too many expensive parser function calls]]. <small>(''[[Template:Expensive|further information]]'')</small> }}<noinclude>{{Documentation}} <!-- Categories to the /doc subpage; interwikis to Wikidata; thanks! --> </noinclude>
#redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) to last revision by [[User:en>HouseBlaster|en>HouseBlaster]]
revision.text: {{ombox | type = style | image = [[File:Ambox warning yellow.svg|40x40px|link=|alt=]] | text = Due to a server limit of '''500''' "[[Help:Template limits#Expensive parser function calls|expensive parser function]]" calls <small>(e.g. [[mw:Help:Extension:ParserFunctions##ifexist|#ifexist:]], [[mw:Help:Magic words#Technical metadata|PAGESIZE:]], and [[mw:Help:Magic words#Statistics|PAGESINCATEGORY:]])</small>, this {{#ifeq: Module | {{NAMESPACE}} | module | template}} will only work properly if the page using it has not already exceeded the limit. When the limit is exceeded, the page using this template or module is categorised in [[:Category:Pages with too many expensive parser function calls]]. <small>(''[[Template:Expensive|further information]]'')</small> }}<noinclude>{{Documentation}} <!-- Categories to the /doc subpage; interwikis to Wikidata; thanks! --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text: {{ombox | type = style | image = [[File:Ambox warning yellow.svg|40x40px|link=|alt=]] | text = Due to a server limit of '''500''' "[[Help:Template limits#Expensive parser function calls|expensive parser function]]" calls <small>(e.g. [[mw:Help:Extension:ParserFunctions##ifexist|#ifexist:]], [[mw:Help:Magic words#Technical metadata|PAGESIZE:]], and [[mw:Help:Magic words#Statistics|PAGESINCATEGORY:]])</small>, this {{#ifeq: Module | {{NAMESPACE}} | module | template}} will only work properly if the page using it has not already exceeded the limit. When the limit is exceeded, the page using this template or module is categorised in [[:Category:Pages with too many expensive parser function calls]]. <small>(''[[Template:Expensive|further information]]'')</small> }}<noinclude>{{Documentation}} <!-- Categories to the /doc subpage; interwikis to Wikidata; thanks! --> </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{ombox | type = style | image = [[File:Ambox warning yellow.svg|40x40px|link=|alt=]] | text = Due to a server limit of '''500''' "[[Help:Template limits#Expensive parser function calls|expensive parser function]]" calls <small>(e.g. [[mw:Help:Extension:ParserFunctions##ifexist|#ifexist:]], [[mw:Help:Magic words#Technical metadata|PAGESIZE:]], and [[mw:Help:Magic words#Statistics|PAGESINCATEGORY:]])</small>, this {{#ifeq: Module | {{NAMESPACE}} | module | template}} will only work properly if the page using it has not already exceeded the limit. When the limit is exceeded, the page using this template or module is categorised in [[:Category:Pages with too many expensive parser function calls]]. <small>(''[[Template:Expensive|further information]]'')</small> }}<noinclude>{{Documentation}} <!-- Categories to the /doc subpage; interwikis to Wikidata; thanks! --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Expensive here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Expensive for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ombox | type = style | image = [[File:Ambox warning yellow.svg|40x40px|link=|alt=]] | text = Due to a server limit of '''500''' "[[Help:Template limits#Expensive parser function calls|expensive parser function]]" calls <small>(e.g. [[mw:Help:Extension:ParserFunctions##ifexist|#ifexist:]], [[mw:Help:Magic words#Technical metadata|PAGESIZE:]], and [[mw:Help:Magic words#Statistics|PAGESINCATEGORY:]])</small>, this {{#ifeq: Module | {{NAMESPACE}} | module | template}} will only work properly if the page using it has not already exceeded the limit. When the limit is exceeded, the page using this template or module is categorised in [[:Category:Pages with too many expensive parser function calls]]. <small>(''[[Template:Expensive|further information]]'')</small> }}<noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Categories to the /doc subpage; interwikis to Wikidata; thanks! -->
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
